order.title: Welcome
order.thxtext: Thank you for your payments, you will receive an invoice in your inbox with 2 business day. For any question or enquires please write to help@kli.one
order.errortext: The payment was not successful due to the following error:
order.errortext2: You can get in touch with help@kli.one for any question or enquiries.
order.thanksstep3: Congratulations! You have successfully registered for the congress. Soon you will receive an email confirming your participation in the congress, as well as with a detailed description of the congress program and links to connect.
order.closethepage: Well done! You can close the page
order.payment_cancel_error: Your payment was cancel. Please try again
order.error_paid: We aren't able to process your payment. Please try again.
order.successfully_paid: You have successfully bought a ticket to the event.
order.membershipPaymentSuccess: You have successfully paid for your subscription
order.processing_event_registration_mb: You have an active membership, we are processing your registration.
order.successfully_registered: You have successfully registered to the event
order.tickets_needs_membership: You need an active membership to register for the event. Once your membership is activated, you can return to this page and complete your registration.
order.payment_initiation_failed: Unable to start payment. Please try again.
order.confirmation_failed: Your payment was processed but we couldn't confirm it. Please contact support at help@kli.one or try again.
order.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please return to membership and try again.

userMenu.logOutText: Do you really want to quit?

common.successHeader: Congratulations! You have successfully registered for the event
common.successDescription: Thanks You for the confirmation. Your details have been saved and ticket is generated. Please click on below link to view your event ticket.

help.requestSubmitted: In order to complete your application for financial help, you must complete the form following the link below
help.request_received_text:
Your request has been sent to the Help Haver team. Your membership status will be updated only after review.

If you still have questions, write to help@kli.one

userDetail.ticketRegistrationSubtitle: In Order for us to produce your ticket. We need you to review following user details
userDetail.startYear: What year did you start in Bnei Baruch?
userDetail.month_needed: How many months do you need ?
userDetail.explain_situation_text: Please explain your financial situation, and please mention you previous contribution (either financial, or volunteering)

somethingWentWrong.description: Something went wrong while processing your request. Please start your registration by clicking below

specialOption.title: Special Options
specialOption.current_situation: What is the current situation for you?
specialOption.successTitleUkraine: You have successfully registered for the event!
specialOption.successTitleRussia: You have successfully registered for the event!
specialOption.successDescription: After registration, we will send you a ticket to the event by email.
specialOption.descriptionIntersectialUkraine: The leadership of the International Kabbalah Academy has decided that participation in this event is free for friends from Ukraine. You just need to register for the event.
specialOption.descriptionIntersectialRussia: Here you can register for the event. After registration, we will send you a ticket to the event by email.

membership.title: Membership
membership.select_country_to_continue: Please select your country to continue
membership.manual_subscription_description: This is a one time payment for the period you choose
membership.auto_subscription_description: Your card will be charged monthly automatically. You can cancel your subscription  at any time.
membership.auto_payment_confirmation_message: After the first payment, automatic payments are charged every month on the 20th, starting from next month.
membership.pay_more_than_month: You can choose to pay more than 1 month
membership.pay_more_than: You can choose to pay more than
membership.succesfully_updated_text: You have successfully updated your subscription
membership.succesfully_updated_card: Your details have been updated successfully! The next payment will be on the 21st of the month, with your updated payment information.

cancellation.cancellation_success_text: Your membership was cancelled successfully. You will not be charge anymore.
cancellation.membership_cancellation_text: Are you sure you want to cancel your membership?
cancellation.precancellation_text: Could you please tell us why? We might be able to help.
cancellation.cancellation_title: What are you cancelling this subscription?
cancellation.adding_anything_else: Is there anything else you'd like to add?
